stemHtml: A pilot is flying through bad weather and tries to remember the temperature below which he/she has to be aware of icing. This value has been told to him/her a week ago in his/her company’s winter operations course. What type(s) of memory were involved in the process of saving and recalling that information?

options.a: The sensory memory and the long-term memory. The value is perceived and evaluated in the sensory memory during the training course, and then transferred directly into the long-term memory.
options.b: All memory types. The information is perceived while in the sensory memory, transferred to the short-term memory and evaluated, and then moved to the long-term memory to keep it.
options.c: The short-term memory. It is responsible for keeping information for a short period of time, in this case for one week.
options.d: The long-term memory. All other types of memory last for only a few minutes.
